title: Enterprise, Exchange and Commerce Platforms — Ogilvy/WPP, Singapore
summary: Exchange, hospitality, e-commerce, CMS, and recurring UX campaign work across Singapore, Asia Pacific, and global markets.
body:
Enterprise, exchange, hospitality, and commerce platform work at Ogilvy/WPP spans Singapore Stock Exchange, Banyan Tree, Danone, and recurring campaign delivery across Singapore and Asia Pacific.

Included projects
- Singapore Stock Exchange CMS
- Banyan Tree Worldwide CMS
- Danone e-commerce CMS
- Annual Ogilvy UX Campaigns

Strategic and technical themes
- Enterprise and platform design in agency environments serving large organisations.
- CMS and experience architecture across exchange, hospitality, and commerce settings.
- Repeated campaign delivery that still required workflow discipline and reusable system thinking.
- Product strategy and prototyping used to move quickly without losing structure.

Proof connection
- This record can connect to the existing Singapore Stock Exchange and Banyan Tree proof objects where relevant.
- It should not invent campaign metrics that do not already exist in the proof layer.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record for Ogilvy, WPP, SGX, Banyan Tree, Danone, or CMS-project questions.

claims: Joz worked on enterprise and commerce platform programmes at Ogilvy/WPP across exchange, hospitality, and consumer contexts.
The programme included SGX, Banyan Tree, Danone, and recurring UX campaign work.
proof_points: Existing proof objects already cover SGX responsive portal re-engineering and the Banyan Tree pitch-winning prototype.
This record groups the broader Ogilvy platform programme for employer-specific retrieval.
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record. No unsupported campaign metrics added.
